name: Maiden in Love
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>恋</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>する<ruby lang="jp"><rb>乙女</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>おとめ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc:
Monsters your opponent controls that can attack must attack this card. Cannot be destroyed by battle. At the end of the Damage Step, if this card battled an opponent's monster: You can activate 1 of these effects;
● Place 1 Maiden Counter on 1 face-up monster your opponent controls.
● Take control of 1 monster your opponent controls with a Maiden Counter.

action: Takes control of an opponent's monster
